Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}You've prevailed yet again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Do you remember what I said before?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}About everything coming to an end?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Well, I recalled something else.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I'm pretty sure the end is unavoidable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}It doesn't feel that inevitable right now, considering the vast potential inside you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Plus, it seems like your power's changed quite a bit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Hey, if you don't mind, can I be your friend?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I'm really curious about you. What do you say?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Okay. Then as of right now, we're friends.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Hehe, guess you don't really care. Maybe I didn't need to bring it up, hm?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}You and I have been together since the beginning.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can feel the beginnings of a bond[n]with the mysterious boy, Pharos...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Well, it's getting late, so I'm going now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}I can hardly wait until the next time we meet.[n]{f 1 1}
